item.zetta_spells.finished_spellbook_fai: Not enough mana to cast the spell!
Use on any minion to extend its lifetime to eternity.
item.zetta_spells.necromancer_staff.desc: Use on your minion to do something.
item.zetta_spells.necromancer_staff.equi: Hold an item in your other hand to equip!
enchantment.zetta_spells.enhance_armamen: Enhances capabilities to harm and to break blocks.
enchantment.zetta_spells.release_recolle: Releases memories of what item knows.
enchantment.zetta_spells.frost_aspect.de: Freezes entities for 10 seconds per hit.
race.cooldown: You need to wait until doing it once more.
spellbook.shift_for_details: Press shift to see the Spell.
spell.zetta_spells.heat_healing.desc: Heals caster greatly. If caster has too much health for fire - it will start burning, and will leave fire behind.
spell.zetta_spells.magic_restoration.des: Creates a construct on caster, that restores mana in one item held. It turns properties of mana to neutral and then changes it to item's mana, transferring it.
spell.zetta_spells.magic_barrier.desc: Conjures small sigil on block, that evil entities cannot bypass by walking, but any others can.
spell.zetta_spells.turn_minion.desc: Reduce any monster's health below lower than yours, then use this spell to make turn it minion for some time. Use Golden Astral Diamond on minion afterwards to make it infinite.
spell.zetta_spells.ore_conversion.desc: Conjures small sigil on block, that converts ore thrown inside it into another. 9 Coal = 1 Iron Ingot. 6 Iron Ingot = 1 Emerald. 24 Emeralds = 1 Diamond. 64 Diamonds = 1 Astral Diamond.
spell.zetta_spells.levitation_sigil.desc: Conjures small sigil on block that makes living entities go up.
spell.zetta_spells.advanced_levitation_s: Conjures small sigil on block that sends living entities to the sky. This is advanced level of scheming in magic world, allowing to have powerful effect on entities.
spell.zetta_spells.resurrect.desc: Because of this manuscript you can bring someone dead to live to be your minion, but for limited time. Unless you use Golden Astral Diamond. Some powerful souls cannot be resurrected!
spell.zetta_spells.hex.desc: Nocturne Knight written this spell, that turns all negative effects target has into direct magic damage. The more negative effects target has - the better Hex works!
spell.zetta_spells.summon_rabbit.desc: You summon few rabbits, those rabbits are great, you might say. They will act as your minions.
spell.zetta_spells.origin.desc: Summon origin upon your enemy, or yourself if sneaking, causing different effects depending on Item you hold!
spell.zetta_spells.summon_bee.desc: You summon Bees so they can BEE with you to fight of your enemies!
spell.zetta_spells.explosion.desc: A spell to create explosion at the pointed place!
spell.zetta_spells.pull.desc: Pull entities to you... though not sure you want to attract zombies.
spell.zetta_spells.summon_warden.desc: Summon darkness from the depths to fight on your side!
effect.zetta_spells.undead.desc: Blessing from Tenebria, granting temporary life as Undead, making all Undead passive.
effect.zetta_spells.heat.desc: Happens when caster is overhealing with Heat Healing.
spellword.zetta_spells.ray.description: Fires a magical ray in the targeted direction
spellword.zetta_spells.apply_effect.desc: Inflicts or grants a status effect
spellword.zetta_spells.cast.description: Cast spell you discovered at ease!
